name: Eversong Woods
region: Quel'Thalas, southeastern patrol routes approaching the southern frontier

sensoryProfile.sight: Amber canopy, gold leaves, fern beds, old standing stones, and Farstrider roads threaded through a curated forest.
sensoryProfile.sound: Birdsong with meaningful gaps, hoofbeats under trees, quiet leather, and the low answer of runestones deeper in the woods.
sensoryProfile.smell: Leaf mold, horse sweat, damp earth, and faint ozone around the ward-stones.
sensoryProfile.touch: Soft forest floor under boot, cool air after the kill, and the familiar pressure of border wind moving through the trees.
sensoryProfile.atmosphere: Ordered wilderness — beautiful, controlled, and legible to a ranger who belongs here.

establishedFacts.fact: Farstrider patrol routes run under Eversong's golden canopy and are shaped by long familiarity with ward-stones and troll pressure.
The southeastern frontier still sees routine Amani violence.
The forest carries the ward network physically: horses react to the bass note, riders track changes in the hum, and the stones matter as part of daily movement.

eventsHere.event: Sylvanas kills the last Amani raider of the patrol sweep.
Lor'themar and Sylvanas banter about the Convocation while stretching the patrol south.
A runner reaches them with word of a detained human mage inside the ward line.
